items.title: Overworld NPC AI
items.summary: Architecture for free-roaming resort NPCs: maps publish activities; guest and staff actors filter, score, and pick. Not partner follow or idle.

heroImage.caption: Target feel: smart-object play with global sprite primitives.

items.title: Partner idle behaviour
items.summary: Partner Pokémon follow the player and pick Nature-weighted idle actions when the player stands still. Separate from free-roam NPC AI.

heroImage.caption: Shipped follower prototype on the 3D test map.

items.title: Overworld Pokémon spawn
items.summary: Which Pokémon appear on each map, when, and on which tile. Weighted natural placement from type, Nature, and Characteristic. Spawn only, not AI.

items.title: Pokéball rest nook
items.summary: Small island fixtures where resting Pokémon sleep inside visible Pokéballs. Player interacts to take one out. Rough idea.

items.title: Ferry arrival presentation
items.summary: Player arrives by ferry. Dock is the first scene on the island.

items.title: Visitor passport index
items.summary: Visitor index: who might show up and what they like to do at the resort.

items.title: POI detective mode
items.summary: Toggle between a clean resort view and one with frames, crops, and reconstruction notes.
